CustomField.description: Number of days from the Original Close Date Stamp to the Active Student Enrollment Percent Met date. (Active_Student_Enrollment_Percent_Met__c - Original_Close_Date_Stamp__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of days from the Original Close Date Stamp to the Active Student Enrollment Percent Met date.
CustomField.label: Days CW to 90 Percent Students Added
